mapper.insert: INSERT INTO feeding_record ( feeder_id, feeder_name, feeder_role, animal_id, animal_name, animal_type, point_id, point_name, feeding_time, food_type, food_amount, status, notes, photos, audit_history ) VALUES ( #{feederId}, #{feederName}, #{feederRole}, #{animalId}, #{animalName}, #{animalType}, #{pointId}, #{pointName}, #{feedingTime}, #{foodType}, #{foodAmount}, #{status}, #{notes}, #{photos}, #{auditHistory} )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM feeding_record WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE feeding_record
feeder_id = #{feederId},
feeder_name = #{feederName},
feeder_role = #{feederRole},
animal_id = #{animalId},
animal_name = #{animalName},
animal_type = #{animalType},
point_id = #{pointId},
point_name = #{pointName},
feeding_time = #{feedingTime},
food_type = #{foodType},
food_amount = #{foodAmount},
status = #{status},
notes = #{notes},
photos = #{photos},
audit_history = #{auditHistory},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, feeder_id AS feederId, feeder_name AS feederName, feeder_role AS feederRole, animal_id AS animalId, animal_name AS animalName, animal_type AS animalType, point_id AS pointId, point_name AS pointName, feeding_time AS feedingTime, food_type AS foodType, food_amount AS foodAmount, status, notes, photos, audit_history AS auditHistory, is_deleted AS isDeleted, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM feeding_record WHERE id = #{id}
